ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reputation_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  "min_reputation" INTEGER /* Minimum reputation for the group */,
  "max_reputation" INTEGER /* Maximum reputation for the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the group */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date when the user left the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_membership_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_membership_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_reputation_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who asked the question */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the question */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the question */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags for the question */,
  "ask_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was asked */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the question */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score or rating of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the answer */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the answer */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date when the answer was provided */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score or rating of the answer */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Whether the answer is accepted or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reputation group */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* Time frame for which the statistics are calculated */,
  "questions_asked" INTEGER /* Number of questions asked by the group */,
  "questions_answered" INTEGER /* Number of questions answered by the group */,
  "questions_unanswered" INTEGER /* Number of questions unanswered by the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_statistics_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_reputation_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
